name: HybridConnectionManager Service Installation
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: HybridConnectionManager Service Installation
SIGMA Description: Rule to detect the Hybrid Connection Manager service installation.

False positives:
- Legitimate use of Hybrid Connection Manager via Azure function apps.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND "Service Name"='HybridConnectionManager' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%hybridconnectionmanager%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY HybridConnectionManager Service Installation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND "Service Name"='HybridConnectionManager' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%hybridconnectionmanager%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.
